subject: Inventory Management System
description: Feature implementation tasks against the running inventory system in apps/inventory/ (AILang) and apps/inventory_py/ (Python)

tasks.description: Add a function movement_check_alert_threshold(product_id, threshold) that returns current QOH alert status.
acceptance: Returns alert map when QOH < threshold
Returns non-alert map when QOH >= threshold

tasks.description: When a product is deactivated via product_update_status(prodId, 'inactive'), cascade: cancel all pending purchase orders for that product, cancel all reservations, and flag all movements as 'cancelled'. Add a function product_deactivate_cascade(prodId) that orchestrates this.

Add an approval step to warehouse transfers: when ti_create_transfer is called with quantity > 100, set status to 'pending_approval' instead of 'pending'. Create ti_approve_transfer(transferId) to set it to 'pending'. Create ti_reject_transfer(transferId) to set it to 'rejected'. The existing transfer_complete should only work on 'pending' transfers.
acceptance: transfer_complete only works on 'pending' transfers (not pending_approval)
